Modular · Fully Integrated · Open-source

Odoo ERP: Modular, Integrated,
Built for Growth.

One platform for every business function — accounting, CRM, inventory, manufacturing, HR, and e-commerce. Odoo is trusted by 12M+ organisations worldwide. Ecosoft clients in Thailand save 60–80% versus SAP licensing costs.

Request a Free Consultation Explore modules

12M+

Users worldwide

Add-on apps

฿0

License fees (Community)

Why Odoo

A Complete Business Platform, Not Just an ERP

One system for sales, accounting, HR, inventory, manufacturing, and e-commerce. Every team sees the same real-time data — no manual exports, no spreadsheet reconciliation, no version conflicts. Just one source of truth across the organisation.

Odoo comes in two editions. Community Edition is 100% free and open source — ideal for organisations that want full control. Enterprise Edition adds advanced modules, official Odoo support, and cloud hosting. Both adapt to your processes through 40,000+ apps and an open API. Don't compromise your workflows to fit your ERP.

Community Edition Core ERP modules with zero license fees, self-hosted and fully open source
Enterprise Edition Advanced modules, official Odoo support, mobile apps, and cloud hosting

Editions

Community vs Enterprise: Choose the Right Edition for Your Organisation

Community Edition

Free & Open Source

  • Core ERP modules included
  • Self-hosted flexibility
  • Strong community support
  • 40,000+ add-on apps
  • No license fees ever

Enterprise Edition

Full-Featured

  • All Community features
  • Advanced modules (Studio, Sign, IoT…)
  • Odoo cloud hosting option
  • Official Odoo support
  • Mobile apps included
  • Upgrade assistance

Modules

Modules Powering Every Part of Your Business

Odoo ERP brings every business function under one roof with seamless integration and a beautiful, user-friendly interface.

📒

Finance & Accounting

Everything from invoices and expenses to multi-company consolidation, handled in one seamlessly integrated suite.

💼

Sales & Customer Management

Close deals faster with CRM, sales automation, subscriptions, and real-time POS — all under one tab.

📦

Inventory & Procurement

Stay in control with smart stock movements, automated purchasing, and streamlined warehouse management.

🏭

Manufacturing & Operations

End-to-end manufacturing, quality, maintenance, and product lifecycle tools for total shop floor control.

📋

Projects & Time Tracking

Plan, assign, and monitor projects, timesheets, and appointments with ease and clarity.

🛍️

Website & E-Commerce

Build stunning websites, sell online, manage field service, and digitize signatures all in one place.

📣

Marketing & Engagement

Automate campaigns, manage events, and drive engagement with fully integrated marketing tools.

👥

HR & Employee Experience

Hire, manage, appraise, and retain top talent with a complete HR toolkit.

🎓

Learning & Customization

Empower teams with eLearning and customize anything with no code using Odoo Studio.

🔗

Smart Integrations & Approvals

Connect devices, streamline approvals, manage docs, and go paperless with powerful system-level features.

Differentiators

What Sets Odoo Apart from Traditional ERP

Not all ERP platforms are built equal. Odoo's open-source foundation, modular architecture, and global community deliver capabilities that proprietary systems simply cannot match.

🔓

No Vendor Lock-In

Total freedom to host, modify, and scale on your terms.

🌍

Globally Trusted

Proven ERP platform with over 12 million users worldwide.

⚡

All-in-One Functionality

Everything from sales to support in one integrated system.

🧩

40,000+ Add-On Apps

Extend capabilities with ready-to-use apps from the Odoo App Store.

🤝

Vibrant Global Community

Thousands of developers and users improving Odoo every day.

Integrations

Connect Anything. Sync Everything.

From e-commerce platforms to payment gateways, Odoo integrates effortlessly with 130+ tools — so your entire tech stack works in perfect harmony.

Pricing

Odoo Implementation Packages

Odoo Community Edition carries zero license fees. Enterprise Edition includes official Odoo support and advanced modules — an additional per-user Odoo license applies. All packages below cover Ecosoft consulting and implementation services.

HRMS / Payroll Only

฿250,000

Odoo HR

  • 30 consulting hours
  • 30-day project validity
  • HR & Payroll modules
  • Thai payroll compliance
Get started

Core Odoo

฿300,000

Accounting · Selling · Buying · Inventory

  • 40 consulting hours
  • 30-day project validity
  • Thai accounting & tax compliance
  • Full source code delivery
Get started
Most Popular

Core + Manufacturing

฿500,000

Above + Manufacturing

  • 70 consulting hours
  • 60-day project validity
  • Full core ERP scope
  • Production & BOM management
  • Thai accounting & tax compliance
  • Full source code delivery
Get started

Core + Manufacturing + HRMS

฿750,000

Above + Odoo HR

  • 100 consulting hours
  • 90-day project validity
  • Full core + manufacturing scope
  • HR & Payroll modules
  • Thai payroll compliance
  • Full source code delivery
Get started

Community Edition: no Odoo license fee. Includes full source code delivery and Thai compliance modules.

Enterprise

฿1,500,000+

Complex Org · Odoo Enterprise License · Accounting Advisory

  • Unlimited consulting hours
  • 90–270 day project validity
  • Odoo Enterprise license included
  • Advanced modules (Studio, Sign, IoT…)
  • Official Odoo cloud hosting option
  • Dedicated accounting advisory
  • Full source code delivery
Talk to us

Pricing ranges from ฿1,500,000 to ฿3,000,000+ depending on scope and user count. Contact us for a tailored quote.

Ready to See Odoo in Action?

Zero license fees (Community) or full enterprise features with official Odoo support. Either way, Ecosoft handles implementation, Thai compliance, training, and long-term support — so your team is productive from day one.
